data.title: ETH Holdings Face Liquidation Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Yu Jin reports that investor Ma Ji Da Ge has faced liquidation of his Ethereum (ETH) positions. Earlier today, he increased his ETH holdings, but shortly thereafter, 20% of his position, approximately 775 ETH, was liquidated. Currently, he retains a position of 2,480 ETH.

data.title: In the past four hours, a total of $111 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, of which approximately $37.48 million was in Ethereum.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $111 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past 4 hours, mainly long positions. Among them, ETH liquidations amounted to approximately $37.48 million and BTC liquidations amounted to approximately $29.47 million.

data.title: Jane Street disclosed that it has purchased $13 million worth of MARA stock.
data.description: Financial giant Jane Street disclosed that it has purchased 1.15 million shares of Bitcoin mining company Mara Holdings (MARA), worth $13 million. (BitcoinTreasuries)

data.title: Federal Reserve Board Member Advocates for Simplified Bank Regulation
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Board member Milan expressed strong support for simplifying bank regulation during a speech on 'Bank Regulation and the Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet.' He suggested that the Federal Reserve should consider exempting government bonds and central bank reserves from bank leverage ratio calculations. Milan also endorsed the natural reduction of the balance sheet but hoped the Federal Reserve would immediately halt quantitative tightening at the FOMC meeting on October 28-29. He noted that a smaller Federal Reserve balance sheet would reduce interest payments to banks, and the size of the balance sheet should depend on the gradual removal of regulatory requirements.

data.description: On Nov 19, 2025, 15:56 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 90,000 USDT and is now trading at 89,992.132813 USDT, with a narrowed 3.19% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan: Supports Natural Balance Sheet Reduction
data.description: In his keynote speech on "Bank Supervision and the Federal Reserve Balance Sheet," Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that he strongly supports simplifying bank supervision and believes the Fed should consider exempting Treasury bonds and central bank reserves from the calculation of bank leverage ratios. Milan indicated his support for a natural balance sheet runoff, but hoped the Fed would immediately halt quantitative tightening (QT) at the October 28-29 FOMC meeting. Milan pointed out that a smaller Fed balance sheet would reduce interest payments to banks, and the size of the balance sheet should depend on a "gradual stripping" of regulatory requirements. (Jinshi)

data.title: Brother Machi's ETH long positions were liquidated, with 20% of his position being forcibly closed.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Ma Ji Dage's ETH long positions added today have just been liquidated, with 20% of his position, approximately 775 ETH, being forcibly closed. He currently holds 2480 ETH.

data.title: Over $39 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with approximately $13.34 million of those liquidations occurring in the Ethereum network.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $39.8618 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $26.2213 million in long positions and $13.6406 million in short positions. In addition, approximately $13.34 million in ETH positions were liquidated and approximately $13.16 million in BTC positions were liquidated.

data.title: The "Anti-CZ Whale" currently has a floating loss of up to $21.5 million due to its overall long positions.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale who shorted $50.62 million worth of ASTER after CZ posted his ASTER holdings is currently facing a floating loss of $21.5 million. He shorted ASTER at $1.20 after CZ's post, and when ASTER later pulled back to $0.84, he had a floating profit of over $16 million. However, he closed his position only a few days later after a rebound, so he ultimately only made a profit of less than $1 million. After closing his ASTER position, he went long on $300 million worth of ETH and XRP. The opening price for ETH was $3,220, and for XRP, it was $2.29. With the recent continued decline in the market, these two long positions have suffered significant losses, currently amounting to a floating loss of $21.5 million.

data.title: Kenya Says No Crypto Firms Licensed Yet — But Bitcoin ATMs Are Already Live
data.description:
Bitcoin ATMs have gone live in major Nairobi shopping centers just days after Kenya's Virtual Assets Service Providers Act took effect, though regulators confirmed no operators have received formal licensing approval.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/kenya-says-no-crypto-firms-licensed-yet-but-bitcoin-atms-are-already-live/

data.title: New exploit found in ServiceNow’s AI agents can be tricked to act against each other
data.description:
A new exploit in ServiceNow’s Now Assist platform can allow malicious actors to manipulate its AI agents into performing unauthorized actions, as detailed by SaaS security firm AppOmni. Default configurations in the software, which enable agents to discover and collaborate with one another, can be weaponized to launch prompt injection attacks far beyond a single […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/servicenows-ai-agents-coordinated-attacks/

data.title: Ripple's CTO proposes a new model to explore native XRP staking.
data.description: David Schwartz, Ripple's Chief Technology Officer (CTO) and one of the founding architects of XRP Ledger, has proposed a new staking model that could revolutionize how the blockchain network operates. The discussion reportedly originated from a long tweet on X by Ripple's Senior Director of Engineering, J. Ayo Akinyele, exploring the possibility of adding staking functionality to XRP Ledger. (TheStreet)

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 6,105 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 40,442 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of 6,105 BTC, with BlackRock experiencing an outflow of 5,628 BTC, currently holding 782,852 BTC; 9 Ethereum ETFs saw a net outflow of 40,442 ETH, with BlackRock experiencing an outflow of 52,612 ETH, currently holding 3,656,670 ETH.
